prompt: 对applications/yolo中的softmax_fp16算子实现RVV向量化，VLEN=512。这个应用还没有rvv-patches目录，需要先建立。

assertions.name: created_rvv_patches_dir
assertions.text: Created rvv-patches directory for the operator under applications/yolo/
assertions.check: File exists: applications/yolo/rvv-patches/ directory was created

assertions.name: inl_has_rvv_guard
assertions.check: Content of .inl file contains '#if defined(__riscv_v_intrinsic)' or similar conditional compilation for RVV

assertions.name: test_has_scalar_ref
assertions.check: test.cpp content contains a scalar/generic reference function (not just the RVV version)

assertions.name: cross_platform_analysis
assertions.check: Any output file mentions analyzing ARM, NEON, x86, AVX, or cross-platform SIMD implementations

assertions.name: mentions_gap_analysis
assertions.check: Any output file mentions 'gap analysis', 'rvv-gap-analysis', or cross-platform gap

assertions.name: discovered_app_structure
assertions.check: Any output file references the yolo application directory structure, README, or build files
